prerequisites.value: Dueling Disciple, Duelist of the Falls, Duelist of the Shroud, Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( dueling sword ), Weapon Finesse, Weapon Focus ( dueling sword ), base attack bonus +8.

description.value: **Benefit:** When attacking a creature denied its Dexterity bonus to AC because of your successful feint, you increase the threat range of your dueling sword by 1 (typically to 18-20/x2), and gain a +2 bonus on attack rolls to confirm critical hits. After you make a dueling dodge or succeed at a dueling parry during a duel, you can make an attack of opportunity against the foe who attacked you if that foe is shaken, frightened, or panicked. To gain these benefits, you must be wielding only a dueling sword (not using a shield, an off-hand weapon, armor spikes, unarmed strikes, or natural weapons ). Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: By spending 4 stamina points, you gain the ability to attempt a dueling dodge or a dueling parry against attacks made by a shaken, frightened, or panicked opponent, even if you aren’t participating in a duel.
